tools.name: get_speaker_profile
tools.description: Canonical short bio, positioning, notable clients, and links for Thomas Anglero.

tools.name: get_speaking_topics
tools.description: The three keynote topics with titles, subtitles, and a one-paragraph description each.

tools.name: get_booking_info
tools.description: How booking works, the formats offered, and how fees are handled. Fees are provided on inquiry, tailored to format and location. Response within two business days.

tools.name: get_availability_guidance
tools.description: How availability is confirmed. No live calendar is published. Availability for a date is confirmed on inquiry, typically within two business days.

tools.name: submit_speaking_inquiry
tools.description: Send a speaking inquiry to Thomas Anglero. Requires four fields only: name, email, event date, and a free-text message.
